steps: Working in the hood, remove 50 ml of DMEM from the 500 ml bottle ( HyClone™ Dulbecco's High Glucose Modified Eagles Medium ). To the remaining 450 ml DMEM add: 50 ml FBS ( Fetal Plus ) (10%) and 5 ml penicillin-streptomycin (1%). Sterile filter into a 500 ml 0.22 filter bottle . Store at 4 °C in .
creator: Elinor Gottschalk
